title: elymus cheniae
intro: Elymus cheniae, also known as Chen's wheat grass or Chinese wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus cheniae include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Elymus cheniae is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and longevity.
